heading: Facilities for advanced training of maintenance technicians for air carrier aircraft
label: 48110 Facilities for advanced training of maintenance technicians for air carrier aircraft
text: For the fiscal years ending –1995, amounts necessary to carry out section 44515 of this title may be appropriated to the Secretary of Transportation out of the Airport and Airway Trust Fund established under section 9502 of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 (). The amounts remain available until expended.September 30, 1993126 U.S.C. 9502See References in Text note below.1
